title: The Tobacco Board Act, 1975
full_text: The Tobacco Board Act, 1975 तम्‍बाकू बोर्ड अधिनियम, 1975 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197504 Act Number: 04 Enactment Date: 1975-03-19 Act Year: 1975 Short Title: The Tobacco Board Act, 1975 Hindi Title: तम्‍बाकू बोर्ड अधिनियम, 1975 Long Title: An Act to provide for the development under the control of the Union of the tobacco industry. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 28-08-1976 Notification: 28th August, 1976, vide notification No. S.O. 3141, dated 20th August, 1976, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Declaration as to expediency of control by the Union. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Establishment and constitution of the Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Salary and allowances and other conditions of service of Chairman. Section 6. Officers of the Board and other staff. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Registration of growers of virginia tobacco. Show Related Subordinates Section 10A. Registration of growers of virginia tobacco seedlings for commercial purposes. Show Related Subordinates Section 11. Registration of curers of virginia tobacco. Show Related Subordinates Section 11A. Registration of processors and manufacturers of virginia tobacco, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 11B. Licences to be obtained for grading work and construction of barns, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Registration of exporters, packers, auctioneers and dealers. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Virginia tobacco to be sold at registered auction platforms Show Related Subordinates Section 13A. Duty of registered dealers and exporters to purchase at auction platforms, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 13B. Duty or buyers of virginia tobacco at places other than auction platforms to refrain from certain unfair practices Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Application, cancellation, fees and other matters relating to registration. Section 14A. Power to levy fees. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Power of inspection Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Grants and loans by the Central Government Section 17. Constitution of the Tobacco Fund. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Borrowing powers of the Board. Section 18A. Writing off of losses. Section 19. Accounts and audit. Section 20. Power to prohibit or control import and export of tobacco and tobacco products. Section 20A. Power of Central Government to authorise purchase of virginia tobacco. Section 21. Directions by Central Government Section 22. Returns and reports Section 23. Penalties. Section 24. Penalties for obstructing a member, officer or other employee of the Board in the discharge of his duties and for failure to produce books and records. Section 25. Other penalties Section 26. Offences by companies Section 27. Jurisdiction of court. Section 28. Previous sanction of Central Government Section 29. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 30. Suspension of operation of Act. Section 31. Application of other laws not barred. Section 32. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 33. Power to make regulations.
